books.title: The Great Roxhythe
books.author: Georgette Heyer
books.summary: A Restoration-era courtier sacrifices his fortune, reputation, and chance at personal happiness to serve his king as a secret spy.

books.title: The Lone Wolf
books.author: Louis Joseph Vance
books.summary: A skilled thief, pursued for his past crimes, is faced with a choice between love or a life of crime.

books.title: The Autobiography of Mark Twain
books.author: Mark Twain
books.summary: A collection of reminiscences and reflections from the author’s experiences.

books.title: Tombstone
books.author: Walter Noble Burns
books.summary: An embellished retelling of the town of Tombstone, Arizona, during its heyday in the late 19th century, featuring famous heroes and outlaws of the American Old West.

books.title: Just So Stories
books.author: Rudyard Kipling
books.summary: A collection of short humorous fables for children, most purporting to tell the origin of animal characteristics such as the camel’s hump.

books.title: The Small Bachelor
books.author: P. G. Wodehouse
books.summary: A struggling artist and his dream girl set off on a series of comedic misadventures.

books.title: The Alchemist
books.author: Ben Jonson
books.summary: A rollicking Elizabethan comedy in which two con men and their female compatriot gull a series of unfortunate victims out of their money.

books.title: A Princess of Mars
books.author: Edgar Rice Burroughs
books.summary: An adventurer finds himself battling alien civilizations on the strange surface of Mars.

books.title: Washington Square
books.author: Henry James
books.summary: A young woman is courted by a man her father disapproves of.

books.title: Brood of the Witch-Queen
books.author: Sax Rohmer
books.summary: A father and son duo investigate a man who is wielding ancient Egyptian magic.

books.title: Travel Essays
books.author: Robert Louis Stevenson
books.summary: A collection of Robert Louis Stevenson’s travel essays.

books.title: The D’Arblay Mystery
books.author: R. Austin Freeman
books.summary: A doctor finds himself entangled in the mysterious death of an artist after discovering his body in a secluded pond.

books.title: Memoirs of a Revolutionist
books.author: Peter Kropotkin
books.summary: A Russian revolutionary tells of his life from early childhood, his adventures as a geographer, and how he turned into an anarcho-communist.

books.title: Tao Te Ching
books.author: Laozi
books.summary: One of the fundamental texts of the Tao philosophy and religion.

books.title: The Pearl
books.author: Anonymous
books.summary: A father is heartbroken after losing his young daughter, whom he thinks of as a beautiful pearl he can never get back.

books.title: Penguin Island
books.author: Anatole France
books.summary: A myopic saint mistakenly baptizes some penguins, ushering in a centuries-spanning satire of French history.

books.title: Short Fiction
books.author: Henry Kuttner
books.summary: A collection of short fiction by Henry Kuttner, ordered by date of original publication.

books.title: Short Fiction
books.author: Daphne du Maurier
books.summary: A collection of short stories by Daphne du Maurier.

books.title: Heretics
books.author: G. K. Chesterton
books.summary: A collection of essays in which G. K. Chesterton debates the intellectuals of his day on a range of topics.

books.title: My Four Weeks in France
books.author: Ring Lardner
books.summary: A sports columnist and humorist travels to France as a war correspondent during World War I and recounts his experiences on the assignment.
